headline: Global AI sell-off batters chip and tech names
detail: The sector you're almost entirely in just took a broad hit. With AVGO, PLTR, CRWD, and SMH all in your book, a continued downdraft hits your margin cushion hard. A bounce today doesn't erase the damage — watch if volume confirms real buying or just short covering.

headline: Inflation hidden triggers could force a Fed rate hike
detail: Two non-oil inflation drivers flagged as potential catalysts for a Fed hike. Higher rates compress valuations on high-multiple tech and AI names like PLTR and CRWD fastest. This is a slow-burn threat but directly relevant to your concentrated growth book.

headline: Qualcomm lands AI data center CPU deal with Meta
detail: Qualcomm signing Meta as first customer for its AI data center chip is a direct shot at Nvidia's turf and relevant to the broader chip narrative around AVGO and SMH. It signals AI infrastructure spending is still alive even after the sell-off, which is a modest positive for your chip names.

headline: Bitcoin drops below $60K, hits lowest since Oct 2024
detail: Risk-off sentiment is showing up across speculative assets simultaneously. This matters as context — when crypto rolls over alongside tech, it often signals broader appetite for risk is shrinking, which is a headwind for names like PLTR and your leveraged positions.
